listing.shortDescription: Find nearby bathrooms with access details, ratings, and offline saves.
listing.fullDescription:
StallPass helps you find a usable bathroom when timing matters.

Open the map to discover nearby public and business restrooms, check access-code availability, compare cleanliness signals, and save dependable stops for later. StallPass is built for city movement, travel days, families, delivery shifts, accessibility needs, and urgent moments where a reliable stop matters.

Features:
- Nearby bathroom discovery on a mobile-first map
- Search filters for access, accessibility, cleanliness, and public availability
- Access-code support with community verification
- Live status and cleanliness ratings
- Favorites for trusted stops
- Offline city packs and route-aware bathroom planning
- Business-verified listing details where owners manage metadata

You can browse as a guest. Sign-in is optional unless you want to save favorites, submit updates, or manage business listings. Location access is requested in context and is used to find relevant nearby bathrooms and improve search relevance.

releaseNotes.1.0.0: Initial StallPass launch with nearby restroom discovery, search filters, access-code support, favorites, accessibility details, offline-aware flows, and business-verified listing controls.

dataSafetySummary.location: Used to find nearby bathrooms and improve search relevance.
dataSafetySummary.personalInfo: Email may be used for optional account authentication and support.
dataSafetySummary.userContent: Bathroom submissions, ratings, reports, photos, and access-code updates may be stored when users contribute.
dataSafetySummary.diagnostics: Crash diagnostics and performance signals may be used to maintain reliability.
dataSafetySummary.dataDeletion: Users can delete their account in the app or at https://www.stallpass.org/delete-account.
